# ResumeFlow
> High-Velocity AI Career Engine & Resume Tailoring Platform

## Main Section
- [Home Page](https://resumeflow.harshithkumar.in) - Secure, real-time automated resume engineering platform.
- [Resume Templates](https://resumeflow.harshithkumar.in/templates) - Browse ATS-compatible templates.
- [Privacy Policy](https://resumeflow.harshithkumar.in/legal/privacy-policy) - Privacy policy.
- [Terms of Service](https://resumeflow.harshithkumar.in/legal/terms-of-service) - Terms of service.
